example: We need to communicate clearly to avoid misunderstandings.
ja: コミュニケーションをとる、伝える

example: Please be respectful of others' opinions during the discussion.
ja: 敬意を持った、礼儀正しい

example: Physical distancing helps reduce the spread of viruses.
The company created a dynamic video to attract customers.
ja: ダイナミックな、活発な

example: Employees are not allowed to enter the premises after hours.
zh: 場所，建築物及其周圍區域
ja: 敷地、建物およびその周辺地域

example: We must adapt to the new working environment quickly.
The company launched new initiatives to improve customer service.
ja: イニシアチブ、主導権、取り組み

example: The marketing materials must be on-brand to maintain consistency.
ja: ブランドイメージに合った

example: Building a strong online presence is crucial for modern businesses.
zh: 線上存在感，網路曝光度
ja: オンラインプレゼンス、ネット上の存在感

example: You will benefit from regular exercise.
